Folie Dept. Tee

“Look it's Folie!”

Tax included. Shipping calculated at checkout.

Heavyweight boxy tee in a vintage-washed white. Hand-distressed Folie Dept. screenprint with the archival red character graphic and script signature. Garment-dyed and stone-washed for a broken-in hand-feel. 240gsm combed cotton. Boxy, slightly cropped fit.

Three colorways. Cut from heavy fleece.
